ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced CNC Platform
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop modular intelligent CNC machine tools. Utilizing nano-level positioning systems and adaptive processing algorithms, this platform enables the production of micro-sensors and composite ceramic barrels, providing core manufacturing capabilities for advanced weaponry.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Heavy Casting Platform
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct industrial-grade heavy forging equipment. This platform integrates high-temperature plasma furnaces with 3D molding technology, designed specifically for casting large military components such as missile propulsion bays and composite armor plates.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Automated Orbital Trading
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct drone landing platforms and quantum communication towers to establish automated trading links with orbital shuttles from the Tiangong Merchant Alliance.
ResearchProjectDef.discoveredLetterText:
To Colony Management Unit:

Orbital monitoring network verification complete.
Result: You have successfully written blueprint data for the Shuttle Landing Pad and Quantum Communication Tower via the Prime Nexus.

Next required actions:
- Construct a Shuttle Landing Pad
- Construct a Quantum Communication Tower

Upon completion of the above steps, the system will automatically enable:
- CELETECH Self-Service Orbital Trade Protocol
- Advanced Artificial Intelligence Collaboration Interface

Landing safety constraints (mandatory):
Unmanned shuttles may only execute approach and landing on a <color=#FF0000>clear, continuously powered, and certified dedicated landing pad</color>.
If these constraints are not met, the mission will be automatically denied.

This message is auto-generated by the Intelligent Trade Station. Do not reply.

CELETECHâ„¢ Intelligent Trade Station
AI Node: 114-51-K

ResearchProjectDef.label: Electromagnetic Acceleration Module
ResearchProjectDef.description: Integrate superconducting coil arrays into traditional firearm structures. By using magnetic fields to secondarily accelerate the projectile, this significantly enhances armor penetration capabilities against light to medium armored targets.\n\n[EM-Kinetic Series]: Long range, high penetration, effective against high armor.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Phase-Change Cooling System
ResearchProjectDef.description: Embed memory alloy layers within the weapon's heat dissipation structure. Utilizing the solid-liquid phase transition process to efficiently absorb high thermal energy generated by firing, ensuring the stability of electromagnetic weapons during sustained combat.\n\n[EM-Kinetic Series]: Long range, high penetration, effective against high armor.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Plasma Booster Technology
ResearchProjectDef.description: Inject high-temperature plasma streams at the end of the electromagnetic rail. Through magnetohydrodynamic effects, this reduces air resistance, allowing the warhead to breach traditional physical limits and achieve ultra-long-range precision strikes.\n\n[EM-Kinetic Series]: Long range, high penetration, effective against high armor.

ResearchProjectDef.label: High-Performance AP Rounds
ResearchProjectDef.description: Optimize core materials and aerodynamic profiles to slightly increase the armor penetration coefficient of armor-piercing rounds.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Warhead Plasma Sheath
ResearchProjectDef.description: Generate a micro-ionic layer around the projectile to slightly reduce kinetic energy loss when penetrating energy shields.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Dynamic Path Calculation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Equip warheads with AI chips to calculate obstacle topology in real-time, automatically planning the optimal penetration path.\n\n[Smart-EM Series]: Combines EM kinetic energy with smart tracking advantages; features long range, high penetration, and guidance capabilities.

ResearchProjectDef.label: //Protocol: XuanMing//
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop the intelligent electromagnetic heavy sniper rifle - "Xuanming".\n\n[Smart-EM Series]: Combines EM kinetic energy with smart tracking advantages; features long range, high penetration, and guidance capabilities.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Neural Link Targeting
ResearchProjectDef.description: Connect optical sights directly to the user's brain-computer interface. Automatically calculates wind speed, gravity, and target trajectory to significantly reduce lock-on time.\n\n[Smart Weapon Series]: Capable of tracking (short range), damage/penetration decays with distance; accuracy scales with shooter's Intellectual skill.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Autonomous Guided Warheads
ResearchProjectDef.description: Combine micro-turbojet engines with dual-mode Infrared/Radar seekers, allowing projectiles to precisely destroy heat-source targets.\n\n[Smart Weapon Series]: Capable of tracking (short range), damage/penetration decays with distance; accuracy scales with shooter's Intellectual skill.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Quantum Imaging Radar
ResearchProjectDef.description: Utilize quantum entanglement principles for through-wall detection, capable of identifying camouflaged targets and highlighting armor weak points.\n\n[Smart Weapon Series]: Capable of tracking (short range), damage/penetration decays with distance; accuracy scales with shooter's Intellectual skill.

ResearchProjectDef.label: High-Energy Particle Focusing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop megawatt-class laser emitters. By using diffractive optical elements to focus energy into micron-level spots and utilizing an adaptive wavelength adjustment system, the weapon can switch ablation modes for different target materials.\n\n[Directed Energy Series]: Guaranteed hit, but short range.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Directed Energy Cutting
ResearchProjectDef.description: Based on the Schwartz-Lee lens focusing principle, a megawatt-class particle beam for industrial cutting has been developed. This technology enables millimeter-precision, non-explosive excavation of near-orbit celestial bodies and deep-planetary crust mineral veins, revolutionizing resource extraction methodologies.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Thermoelectric Circulation Unit
ResearchProjectDef.description: The weapon's cooling system converts waste heat into electrical energy, creating a positive feedback loop that increases efficiency during prolonged combat.\n\n[Directed Energy Series]: Guaranteed hit, but short range.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Weakpoint Analysis Protocol
ResearchProjectDef.description: Automatically constructs a 3D model of the target via millimeter-wave scanning. The system guides the laser beam to prioritize key nodes such as welds and circuits, significantly improving destruction efficiency.\n\n[Directed Energy Series]: Guaranteed hit, but short range.

ResearchProjectDef.label: //Protocol: Qiyao//
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop the intelligent spectral rifle - "Qiyao".\n\n[Directed Energy Series]: Guaranteed hit, but short range.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Warheads
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop advanced multi-purpose warheads capable of effectively neutralizing various types of targets through switchable fuse modes.

ResearchProjectDef.label: AI Cooperative Guidance
ResearchProjectDef.description: Missiles equipped with neural network chips capable of autonomously planning attack routes and executing coordinated strikes.

ResearchProjectDef.label: //Protocol: Taotie//
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop the heavy particle beam rifle - "Taotie".

ResearchProjectDef.label: //Protocol: Zhurong//
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop the individual plasma projector - "Zhurong".

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Monomolecular Blades
ResearchProjectDef.description: Built-in crystal oscillators generate high-frequency vibrations in the blade. Combined with monomolecular coating, this allows for effortless slicing through heavy armor.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Weapon Persona Programming
ResearchProjectDef.description: Integrate a super-AI downlink within melee weapons, assisting the user in executing complex martial combat techniques.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Next-Gen Melee Theory
ResearchProjectDef.description: Next-generation close-quarters combat technology is currently in the theoretical verification stage.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Funnel Core Technology
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks the fundamental principles of anti-gravity propulsion and basic funnel chassis construction. Allows production of primitive funnel components and simple remote guidance systems.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Funnel Control Systems
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develops advanced control interfaces and programming protocols for funnel coordination. Enables basic remote operation and formation flying capabilities with limited tactical functions.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Funnel Components
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develops high-efficiency power systems and reinforced structural materials. Enables production of combat-grade funnel components with enhanced durability and extended operational range.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Personal Funnel Hangers
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develops compact funnel storage and deployment systems for individual operators. Enables creation of portable funnel hangers that provide mobile fire support for field operations.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Basic Defense Turrets
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct light automated turrets for basic base defense.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Heavy Fortifications
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct fixed heavy turrets with greater firepower and thicker armor.

ResearchProjectDef.label: //SkyNet: Energy Shields//
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct advanced force-field generators. A dynamic defense network composed of hexagonal energy units capable of deflecting most solid projectiles and effectively resisting EMP attacks.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Destroyer-Class Armaments
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock and construct large-scale vehicle/ship-mounted weapon systems suitable for escort destroyers and armed merchant ships.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Nano-Weave Armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: Utilizes self-repairing carbon nanotube weaving technology embedded with liquid metal microcapsules. Upon impact, nanofibers automatically restructure density to disperse shock, while liquid metal instantly fills damaged areas.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Kinetic Conversion Armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: A reinforced exoskeleton system integrated with a piezoelectric crystal matrix, capable of converting absorbed physical kinetic energy into electrical energy for storage.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Phase-Shift Armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: Applies superfluid quantum locking technology. The atomic structure of the impacted area undergoes an instant phase change to a neutron-degenerate state, exponentially increasing hardness.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Next-Gen Protection Theory
ResearchProjectDef.description: Next-generation protection technology is currently in the theoretical verification stage.

ResearchProjectDef.label: //Beidou: Advanced Neural Implants//
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop advanced brain combat implants capable of deeply stimulating human potential.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Crystalline Weapon Coating
ResearchProjectDef.description: Configure weapons with advanced programmable crystalline coatings to adapt to different tactical environments.\n\n*Select the colonist equipped with the weapon and right-click the [Weapon Modification Station] to change camouflage or accessories.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Basic Weapon Accessories
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks basic hardware and software optimization schemes for individual weapons.\n\n*Select the colonist equipped with the weapon and right-click the [Weapon Modification Station] to modify (accessories must be placed in the Accessory Box beforehand).

ResearchProjectDef.label: Custom Weapon Accessories
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlocks master-class deep optimization schemes for individual weapon hardware and software.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Basic Power Infrastructure
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock construction techniques for basic power facilities.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Fission Reaction Groups
ResearchProjectDef.description: Safe and reliable compact nuclear fission batteries, suitable for providing stable power in extreme environments or resource-scarce conditions.

ResearchProjectDef.label: //Void: Zero-Point Reactor//
ResearchProjectDef.description: Utilize the Casimir effect to extract vacuum quantum fluctuation energy, providing a nearly infinite supply of clean energy.

ResearchProjectDef.label: CAS: System Access Protocol
ResearchProjectDef.description: Convince the air support node of the colony's economic viability in exchange for carrier-based fighter close air support.
ResearchProjectDef.discoveredLetterTitle: CMC™ Support Node Access Confirmation Receipt
ResearchProjectDef.discoveredLetterText:
TO: Colonial Administration Unit:

Orbital defense system network integration complete. ACQUIRED: Your precise coordinates have been registered with automated support carrier CSSA-549 "Lanling." Optimal strike corridors calculated.

SYSTEM NOTICE:
-JX-02 fighter support missions consume computational resources and munitions. A service fee will be levied per strike.
-Synthetic pilots will automatically calculate optimal approach vectors, prioritizing entry from less congested airspace.
-JX-02 fighters have limited fuel and ordnance capacity. Plan strike routes, munitions selection, and engagement timing accordingly.
-<color=#FF0000>CMC™ Defense Division and its subordinate automated nodes assume no liability for collateral damage resulting from airstrikes.</color>

This message was automatically generated by an intelligent defense node. Do not reply.

Celestial Forge™ Automated Support Node
AI Node: CSSA-549-191-81-0

ResearchProjectDef.label: CAS efficiency improvement protocol
ResearchProjectDef.description: Allows manual airstrike direction control.

ResearchProjectDef.label: CAS: Weapons Bay Expansion Protocol
ResearchProjectDef.description: Negotiate with the air support node to permit JX-02 fighters to forgo the standard 4 air-to-air missile requirement in exchange for additional ground-attack ordnance capacity.\n\nEffect: Some airstrike missions will gain an additional attack wave.

ResearchProjectDef.label: CAS: Hangar Expansion Protocol
ResearchProjectDef.description: Coordinate remotely with the air support node to assemble an additional JX-02 fighter from pooled resources.\n\nEffect: +1 available attack aircraft.
